title: Joachyy's Autumn Resource Pack
body:
![baner](https://i.imgur.com/6qbHcaC.png)
## Autumn themed resource pack that will bring cozy vibes to your world.
### Pack features:  
- Autumnal foliage and grass.  
- Enhanced light colors.    
- and more

Warning!
This pack requires optifine features, if you are using sodium(and other non-optifine performance mods) you should consider installing mods from this link : https://github.com/LambdAurora/optifine_alternatives
